section.heading: Senior Intelligence Oversight Official

subsection.heading: Establishment.—
subsection.content: The Secretary of Defense, or a designee of the Secretary determined by regulations prescribed by the Secretary, shall designate a civilian employee of the Department of Defense in the Senior Executive Service to serve as the Senior Intelligence Oversight Official.

subsection.heading: Responsibilities.—
subsection.content: The Senior Intelligence Oversight Official shall conduct independent oversight of all intelligence, counterintelligence, and intelligence-related activities of the Department of Defense and shall have such other related responsibilities as may be determined by the Secretary.

subsection.heading: Access.—
subsection.chapeau: The Senior Intelligence Oversight Official shall have—

paragraph.content: access to all information necessary to carry out the responsibilities and functions of the Senior Intelligence Oversight Official, as determined by the Secretary; and
direct access to the Secretary of Defense and the Deputy Secretary of Defense, as circumstances require in the determination of the Senior Intelligence Oversight Official.

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 118–159, div. A, title IX, § 921(a), Dec. 23, 2024, 138 Stat. 2036; amended Pub. L. 119–60, div. A, title XVII, § 1701(a)(8), Dec. 18, 2025, 139 Stat. 1208.)

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 2025—Pub. L. 119–60 substituted “Intelligence Oversight Official” for “intelligence oversight official” in section catchline.

note.heading: Review of Regulations
note.p: Pub. L. 118–159, div. A, title IX, § 921(b), Dec. 23, 2024, 138 Stat. 2036, provided that: “The Secretary of Defense shall review and update, as appropriate, Department of Defense Directive 5148.13, and any associated or successor regulation or directive, to conform to section 430c of title 10, United States Code, as added by subsection (a).”
